DNSVisibility.description: false: private network resolution (default). true: private and public network resolution.

EipId.description: EIP ID, valid only for Public addresses.

NetworkType.description: Network address type. Values: Private: private address. Public: public address

SubnetId.description: Subnet ID, valid only for Private addresses

AutoStorageScalingConfig.description: Auto scaling configuration for the instance

EnableStorageAutoScale.description: Whether to enable automatic scaling for the instance. Values: true: Yes. false: No.

StorageThreshold.description: Percentage of available storage space that triggers automatic scaling. Value range: 10–50, default: 10, unit: %

StorageUpperBound.description: Maximum storage space for automatic expansion. The minimum value is instance storage space + 20 GB; the maximum value is the upper limit of the storage space range for the primary node specification, in GB. See details about selectable storage space ranges for different specifications.

AutoRenew.description: Enable auto-renewal for prepaid scenarios. Values: true: auto-renewal. false: do not auto-renew

ChargeEndTime.description: Billing end time for subscription instance (UTC). Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.sssZ.

ChargeStartTime.description: Billing start time for the instance (UTC). Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.sssZ

ChargeStatus.description: Instance billing status. Values: Normal: normal. Overdue: overdue. Unpaid: pending payment.

ChargeType.description: Billing type. Options: PrePaid: subscription. PostPaid: pay-as-you-go

Number.description: Number of instances to purchase. Value range: 1–50. Default: 1

OverdueReclaimTime.description: Estimated release time after the instance is stopped due to overdue payment (pay-as-you-go) or expiration (subscription), in UTC. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.sssZ

OverdueTime.description: Time when the instance is stopped due to overdue payment (pay-as-you-go) or expiration (subscription) (UTC). Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.sssZ.

PeriodUnit.description: Purchase cycle in prepaid scenarios. Month: monthly purchase cycle (default). Year: yearly purchase cycle.

TempModifyEndTime.description: Restore time for temporary scaling (UTC). Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.sssZ.

TempModifyStartTime.description: Start time for temporary scaling (UTC). Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.sssZ

DisasterRecoveryInstance.description: Detailed information about the disaster recovery instance

DtsTaskId.description: ID of synchronization tasks between primary and disaster recovery instances.

DtsTaskName.description: Name of the synchronization task between the primary instance and the disaster recovery instance

DtsTaskStatus.description: Status of synchronization tasks between the primary instance and the disaster recovery instance

SecondsBehindMaster.description: Latency between the disaster recovery instance and the primary instance.

AutoAddNewNodes.description: When the endpoint type is read/write or read-only, you can set whether new nodes join automatically. Values: Enable: auto join. Disable: do not auto join (default)

ConnectionMode.description: Connection endpoint type. Values: Proxy: proxy endpoint. Direct: direct endpoint

ConnectionPoolType.description: Connection pool type for proxy terminal. Values: Transaction: Transaction-level connection pool. Default value. Direct: Direct mode.

EnableConnectionPersistent.description: Enable connection keep-alive. Options: true: yes. false: no

EnableReadOnly.description: Is global read-only enabled? Values: Enable: enabled. Disable: not enabled.

EnableReadWriteSplitting.description: Whether to enable read/write separation. Values: Enable: Enabled. Disable: Not enabled.

EndpointType.description: Endpoint type. Value: Custom, custom endpoint.

IdleConnectionReclaim.description: Whether the idle connection recycling feature is enabled. true: Enabled. false: Not enabled.

ImplicitTransSplit.description: Whether to enable transaction separation. Values: true: Yes. false: No.

MasterNodeRouting.description: Whether to enable primary node routing. Values: true: Yes. false: No.

MasterProtectorTimeout.description: Overload protection timeout. Value range: integer between 60 and 7200, in seconds.

MultiStatementsMode.description: Multi-Statements mode for proxy endpoints. Values: Strict: strict mode (default). Loose: loose mode

OverloadProtection.description: Overload protection enabled. Values: true: yes. false: no

ReadOnlyNodeDistributionType.description: Read weight allocation mode. This parameter is required when read/write splitting is enabled (set to true). For request parameters in the CreateDBEndpoint and ModifyDBEndpoint APIs, valid values are: LoadSchedule: load scheduling. RoundRobinCustom: custom weighted round-robin scheduling. RoundRobinAuto: automatic weighted round-robin scheduling. For response parameters in the DescribeDBInstanceDetail API, valid values are: Default: automatic allocation based on specification weights. Custom: custom weight allocation. RoundRobin: round-robin scheduling. LoadSchedule: load scheduling. RoundRobinCustom: custom weighted round-robin scheduling. RoundRobinAuto: automatic weighted round-robin scheduling.

ReadOnlyNodeMaxDelayTime.description: Read-only node latency threshold. Value range: 1~3600, default is 30, unit: seconds.

ReadOnlyNodeWeight.description: List of nodes configured for the connection endpoint and their corresponding read-only weights.

ReadWriteMode.description: Read/write mode: ReadWrite: read/write. ReadOnly: read-only

MaintenanceWindow.description: Specify the maintenance window when creating the instance. This field is optional. If not set, the default is every day of the week from UTC 18:00Z–21:59Z (Beijing time 02:00–05:59)

DayOfWeek.description: Specify the days of the week when the maintenance window is active. Multiple selections allowed. Monday: Monday. Tuesday: Tuesday. Wednesday: Wednesday. Thursday: Thursday. Friday: Friday. Saturday: Saturday. Sunday: Sunday.

items.description: Effective days of the week for the maintenance window

MaintenanceTime.description: Instance maintenance window. Format: HH:mmZ-HH:mmZ (UTC). Note: Specifies the time period during which maintenance can be performed.

DelayReplicationTime.description: Replication delay time for read-only nodes. Value range: 0–604800, unit: seconds

NodeStatus.description: Node status. Values: Running: running. Creating: creating. Deleting: deleting. Restarting: restarting. Restoring: restoring. Updating: updating. Upgrading: upgrading. Error: error

NodeType.description: Node type. Values: Primary: primary node. Secondary: secondary node. ReadOnly: read-only node.

SyncDelay.description: Latency between node and primary node, in milliseconds (ms).

VCPU.description: Number of CPU cores for the node

DBProxyStatus.description: Status of the instance database proxy feature. Values: Creating: proxy enabling. Running: proxy running. Shutdown: proxy disabled. Deleting: proxy disabling

ProxyResourceInfo.description: Resource information for the instance's database proxy service

CurrentProxyCpuNum.description: Current number of cores for the instance database proxy service

MaxProxyCpuNum.description: Maximum number of cores configurable for database proxy service.

MinProxyCpuNum.description: Minimum number of CPU cores configurable for the database proxy service

NodeId.description: Read-only nodes require NodeId. Primary nodes do not require it

NodeType.description: Node type. Primary: primary node. ReadOnly: read-only node

Weight.description: Node read weight, increments of 100, maximum value is 10000.

Tag.description: Tag information for the RDS MySQL instance.

description: Volcano Engine Cloud Database MySQL Edition is an elastic and reliable online relational database service built on the open-source MySQL database. MySQL instances are deployed using cloud-native methods and local SSD storage, delivering high-performance read and write capabilities. The service is fully compatible with the MySQL engine and offers a complete suite of solutions, including instance management, backup and recovery, log management, monitoring and alerts, and data migration. This helps enterprises simplify complex database management and operations, allowing them to focus more time and resources on their core business.

AddressObjects.description: Connection information for the default endpoint

AllowListIds.description: Allowlist ID. To bind multiple allowlists, separate allowlist IDs with commas (,). Each instance can bind up to 100 allowlists

AutoUpgradeMinorVersion.description: Instance kernel minor version upgrade policy. Values: Auto: Automatic upgrade. Manual: Manual upgrade.

BackupAuditLogSize.description: Space used by audit logs in backup.

BackupBinLogSize.description: Space used by binlog logs in backup.

BackupDataSize.description: Space used by data in backup.

BackupErrorLogSize.description: Space used by error logs in backups.

BackupFreeQuotaSize.description: Free backup storage space, in GB

BackupLogSize.description: Space used by logs in backups.

BackupSlowLogSize.description: Space used by slow logs in backups.

BackupUse.description: Backup space used by the instance, in GB

BasicBackupBinlogSize.description: Space used by Binlog logs in basic backups.

BasicBackupDataSize.description: Space used by data in the base backup

CpuNum.description: Number of CPU cores for the database proxy service of the instance

DBEngineVersion.description: Compatible versions. Values: MySQL_5_7: MySQL 5.7 version. MySQL_8_0: MySQL 8.0 version

DBParamGroupId.description: Parameter template ID. Default value is the default parameter template for the database engine version

DBTimeZone.description: Time zone. Supports UTC -12:00 ~ +13:00. Default is the time zone of the region.

DeletionProtection.description: Whether to enable instance deletion protection. Values: Enabled: Yes. Disabled: No. Default value.

DisasterRecoveryInstances.description: Disaster recovery instance information for the instance.

DrDtsTaskId.description: ID of the data synchronization link between the primary and disaster recovery instances in the DTS data synchronization task.

DrDtsTaskName.description: Name of synchronization tasks between primary and disaster recovery instances.

DrDtsTaskStatus.description: Status of synchronization tasks between primary and disaster recovery instances.

DrSecondsBehindMaster.description: Latency between the disaster recovery instance and the primary instance.

GlobalReadOnly.description: Enable global read-only mode. Values: true: enabled. false: disabled (default is false)

HasDisasterRecoveryInstances.description: Whether the instance has a disaster recovery instance. Values: true: Yes. false: No.

HasGreenInstance.description: Is the instance in blue-green deployment? Values: true: yes. false: no.

InstanceType.description: Instance type. Values: DoubleNode: dual-node type. MultiNode: multi-node type

LowerCaseTableNames.description: Whether table names are case-sensitive. Default value is true. Values: false: Table names are stored as fixed and are case-sensitive. true: Table names are stored in lowercase and are case-insensitive.

MaintenanceWindow.description: Specify the maintenance window for the instance when creating it. This field is optional. If not set, the default is UTC18:00Z-21:59Z every day of the week (Beijing time 02:00-05:59).

NodeCPUUsedPercentage.description: Average CPU usage of the primary node in the instance over the past minute.

NodeMemoryUsedPercentage.description: Average memory usage of the primary node over the past minute

NodeSpaceUsedPercentage.description: Average disk usage of the primary node over the past minute

Port.description: Default endpoint private network port. Port range: 1000~65534, default is 3306. When creating a new connection endpoint or enabling a new address, the default endpoint private network port is used for real-time configuration as the default port.

StorageAuditLogSize.description: Space used by audit logs in instance storage

StorageBinLogSize.description: Binlog space usage in the instance storage

StorageDataSize.description: Space used by data in instance storage.

StorageErrorLogSize.description: Space used by error logs in instance storage.

StorageLogSize.description: Space used by logs in the instance storage

StorageSlowLogSize.description: Space used by slow logs in instance storage

StorageSpace.description: Total storage space of the instance, in GB

StorageType.description: Instance storage type. Value range: LocalSSD: local disk. CloudESSD_FlexPL: FlexPL cloud disk. CloudESSD_PL0: PL0 cloud disk.

StorageUse.description: Storage space used by the instance, in GB

SuperAccountName.description: High-privilege account name. If this parameter is not provided, a high-privilege account will not be created by default.

SuperAccountPassword.description: Password for high-privilege account. Password rules: 8–32 characters in length. Must contain at least three of the following: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, special characters. Special characters: !@#$%^&*()_+-=,.&?|/.

SyncMode.description: Data synchronization mode: SemiSync: semi-synchronous. Async: asynchronous

ZoneId.description: Availability zone of the instance's primary node.

ZoneIds.description: List of availability zones for each node in the instance.
